trigger.evidence: NPC paces at 1.5 m/s (slow but not crawl), ego_1 (TCP cruise ~3.5 m/s) closes at ~2 m/s. Brake fires at point-blank (6m c-c) around t=9.5s with ego_1 at ~y=253 and NPC at ~y=259 — TTC ~1.7s vs TCP stopping distance ~1.75m, so emergency brake is a coin-flip. ego_1's goal was extended to y=260 (was y=244) so the brake fires while ego is still en-route to its last waypoint. After brake, NPC resumes at 5 m/s (no crawl) and the encounter resolves quickly.
